property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Pop mode stack -- return to the prior active mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Recenters freelook: holds F4 + the freelook vJoy button for 0.5s, then releases.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Routed to mouse Y, not vJoy -- lets you tilt the camera in 3rd-person while flying.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Routed to mouse Y so you can free-look up/down while flying in 3rd person.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Routed to mouse X, not vJoy -- lets you pan the camera in 3rd-person while flying.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Routed to mouse X so you can free-look left/right while flying in 3rd person.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Clean 100ms tap on light-amp vJoy button. Activation-mode must stay "release" (not "both").

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Click 'Invert Curve' below to flip this axis if you prefer the other direction.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: cycle operator mode. Hold 0.5s: drop to SCM and toggle mining.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: cycle operator mode. Hold 0.5s: drop back to SCM.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: cycle operator mode. Hold 0.5s: switch to Nav mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: toggle freelook. Hold 0.5s: run Reset Freelook macro to recenter the camera.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: MFD quick-repair-all. Hold 0.5s: cycle master mode.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: MFD quick-repair-all. Hold 0.5s: drop to Aux and toggle mining.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: MFD quick-repair-all. Hold 0.5s: switch to Aux and set mining.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tap: ping radar. Hold 0.5s: light amp toggle (via macro -- SC needs a tap-shape, not a hold).
